“why do you waste your time on stuff like this” I actually get a lot of comments like this, people telling me I'm wasting my time focusing on details like this that “nobody is going to notice anyway” But for every one comment like this I get another ten praising how good the app feels to use 😮‍💨 These little details might seem like a huge waste of time to most people but I'm playing a very long-term game with my apps When you add them all up, that time investment does actually pay off #softwaredeveloper #coding #appdesign
